translations.en: I'm out of coffee this morning.
translations.fr: Je n’ai plus de café ce matin.
translations.de: Ich habe heute Morgen keinen Kaffee mehr.
translations.it: Mi manca il caffè questa mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上没有咖啡了。
translations.ru: У меня сегодня утром закончился кофе.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi hết cà phê rồi.
translations.nl: Ik heb vanmorgen geen koffie meer.
translations.uk: У мене сьогодні вранці закінчилася кава.
translations.hi: मेरे पास आज सुबह कॉफी नहीं है।
translations.pl: Skończyła mi się dziś rano kawa.
translations.el: Μου τελείωσε ο καφές σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke mer kaffe i morges.
translations.sv: Jag har slut på kaffe i morse.
translations.ro: Nu mai am cafea azi dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg er løbet tør for kaffe i morges.
translations.ja: 今朝はコーヒーがありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, first person singular, used as clitic object pronoun; here it functions as the experiencer/indirect object of 'falta'.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular; expresses absence or insufficiency.
Common noun, masculine singular; serves as the thing lacking.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'mañana'.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal noun indicating the morning.

sentences.target: Te faltan dos minutos para salir.

translations.es: Te faltan dos minutos para salir.
translations.en: You have two minutes left before leaving.
translations.fr: Il te reste deux minutes avant de partir.
translations.de: Dir bleiben noch zwei Minuten bis zum Losgehen.
translations.it: Ti restano due minuti prima di uscire.
translations.ru: У тебя осталось две минуты до выхода.
translations.pt: Faltam dois minutos para você sair.
translations.he: נותרו לך שתי דקות לפני היציאה.
translations.vi: Bạn còn hai phút nữa là phải đi.
translations.nl: Je hebt nog twee minuten voordat je vertrekt.
translations.uk: У тебе лишилося дві хвилини до виходу.
translations.hu: Még két perced van az indulásig.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे निकलने में अभी दो मिनट बाकी हैं।
translations.pl: Zostały ci dwie minuty do wyjścia.
translations.el: Σου μένουν δύο λεπτά πριν φύγεις.
translations.nb: Du har to minutter igjen før du drar.
translations.id: Tinggal dua menit lagi sebelum kamu pergi.
translations.sv: Du har två minuter kvar innan du går.
translations.ro: Mai ai două minute până să pleci.
translations.cs: Do odchodu ti zbývají dvě minuty.
translations.da: Du har to minutter tilbage, før du går.
translations.fi: Sinulla on vielä kaksi minuuttia ennen lähtöä.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, second person singular, used as clitic object pronoun; here it functions as the experiencer/indirect object of 'faltan'.
Main verb in present indicative, third person plural; agrees with the plural subject 'dos minutos'.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutos'.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of 'faltan'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose/complement clause.
Infinitive verb; complements 'para'.

translations.en: We're out of sugar at home.
translations.fr: Nous n’avons plus de sucre à la maison.
translations.de: Zu Hause haben wir keinen Zucker mehr.
translations.it: A casa non abbiamo più zucchero.
translations.vi: Ở nhà chúng tôi hết đường rồi.
translations.nl: We hebben thuis geen suiker meer.
translations.hi: घर में चीनी खत्म हो गई है।
translations.pl: Skończył nam się cukier w domu.
translations.el: Μας τελείωσε η ζάχαρη στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Vi er tom for sukker hjemme.
translations.sv: Vi har slut på socker hemma.
translations.da: Vi er løbet tør for sukker derhjemme.
translations.ja: 家に砂糖がありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, first person plural, used as clitic object pronoun; here it functions as the experiencer/indirect object of 'falta'.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular; used with singular mass noun subject 'azúcar'.
Common noun, singular mass noun; subject of 'falta'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'en'.

translations.en: Juan is absent from work today.
translations.fr: Juan est absent du travail aujourd’hui.
translations.de: Juan ist heute nicht bei der Arbeit.
translations.it: Juan oggi è assente dal lavoro.
translations.vi: Hôm nay Juan vắng mặt ở chỗ làm.
translations.nl: Juan is vandaag afwezig op het werk.
translations.hu: Juan ma nincs bent a munkahelyén.
translations.hi: जुआन आज काम पर नहीं है।
translations.pl: Juan jest dziś nieobecny w pracy.
translations.el: Ο Juan απουσιάζει σήμερα από τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Juan er borte fra jobb i dag.
translations.id: Juan tidak masuk kerja hari ini.
translations.sv: Juan är frånvarande från jobbet i dag.
translations.ro: Juan lipsește azi de la muncă.
translations.cs: Juan je dnes v práci nepřítomen.
translations.da: Juan er fraværende fra arbejde i dag.
translations.ja: フアンは今日は仕事を休んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun, masculine singular; subject of 'falta'.
Main verb in present indicative, third person singular; here it means 'to be absent' or 'to miss (an obligation)'.
Adverb of time modifying the verb.
Contracted preposition 'a' + masculine singular definite article 'el'; introduces the destination/goal phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'al'.

jp: Te faltan dos minutos para salir.
es: Te faltan dos minutos para salir.
en: I'm out of coffee this morning.
You have two minutes left before leaving.
We're out of sugar at home.
Juan is absent from work today.
